title: ¿Quién me quiere a mí?
director: José Luis Sáenz de Heredia, Luis Buñuel
actors: Lina Yegros, Mari-Tere Pacheco, José Baviera
plot: The famous soprano Marta Vélez decides to retire from the operatic stages to rebuild her marriage. Her husband, a heartless scoundrel, tries to swindle a large sum of money from her. But when he can't get it, he devises a plan to ...
